summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new POS features: Daily Sessions (حصص البيع اليومية), Customer Families (عائلات الزبائن), and Supplier Families (عائلات الموردين). Backend: 100% pass (15/15 tests). Frontend: All pages load correctly with full CRUD functionality working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions - Returns list of sessions
Backend: POST /api/daily-sessions - Creates new session successfully
Backend: POST /api/daily-sessions - Prevents duplicate open sessions (400)
Backend: PUT /api/daily-sessions/:id/close - Closes session successfully
Backend: GET /api/daily-sessions/current - Returns current session or null
Backend: GET /api/customer-families - Returns list of families
Backend: POST /api/customer-families - Creates new family
Backend: PUT /api/customer-families/:id - Updates family
Backend: DELETE /api/customer-families/:id - Deletes family
Backend: GET /api/supplier-families - Returns list of families
Backend: POST /api/supplier-families - Creates new family
Backend: PUT /api/supplier-families/:id - Updates family
Backend: DELETE /api/supplier-families/:id - Deletes family
Backend: Existing seed data verified (VIP customers, Local suppliers)
Frontend: /daily-sessions page loads with data-testid
Frontend: Daily Sessions - Open Session dialog works
Frontend: Daily Sessions - Current session card displays correctly
Frontend: Daily Sessions - Close Session dialog works
Frontend: Daily Sessions - Sessions history table displays
Frontend: /customer-families page loads with data-testid
Frontend: Customer Families - Add Family button and dialog work
Frontend: Customer Families - Form inputs (name, description) work
Frontend: Customer Families - Table displays with edit/delete actions
Frontend: /supplier-families page loads with data-testid
Frontend: Supplier Families - Add Family dialog works
Frontend: Supplier Families - Create family shows success toast
Frontend: Supplier Families - Delete confirmation dialog works
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features implemented correctly with proper API structure
Daily Sessions uses single session per store (not per employee) as requested
Customer/Supplier Families have proper count tracking via DB queries
Delete operations properly check for dependent data before deletion
All frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Toast notifications work for success/error feedback
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Daily Sessions, Customer Families, Supplier Families) are fully functional. APIs tested with pytest, Frontend tested with Playwright. Sidebar navigation includes links to all 3 pages under respective sections. Auth: test@test.com/test123

features: Open new session with opening cash
View current session with stats (cash, credit sales, count)
Close session with actual cash and notes
Sessions history table with difference calculation
Single session per store (not per employee)
